message:
refactor(overlay): add apply() convenience alias

Add SkillOverlay::apply() as an ergonomic alias for apply_to().

The shorter name improves readability at call sites while maintaining
full backwards compatibility with existing code using apply_to().

Example usage:
  overlay.apply(&mut spec, &context)
vs:
  overlay.apply_to(&mut spec, &context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
